rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (using the same reward model that was the PPO optimization target as the sole judge may introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content in future evaluations).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
